nasb.text: How much more valuable then is a man than a sheep! So then, it is lawful to do good on the Sabbath.”

esv.text: Of how much more value is a man than a sheep! So it is lawful to do good on the Sabbath.”

cnv.text: 人比羊貴重得多了！所以，在安息日行善是可以的。”

ccb.text: 人比羊要贵重多了！所以在安息日行善合情合理。”

csbs.text: 人比羊重要多了！所以，在安息日做好事是可以的。”
